name: closed loop step monitor-feedback surfaces upstream drift back into the catalog as a new diff
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro standards && printf 'sources: [{id: owasp-asvs}]\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step monitor-feedback --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --fetcher-stub new-content --decisions standards/decisions.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q 'monitor_drift_detected' standards/decisions.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
